criteria.name: User Ratings
criteria.description: Average user ratings on major app stores (e.g., Google Play, Apple App Store).
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store

criteria.name: Number of Downloads
criteria.description: Total number of downloads across major app stores.
criteria.sources: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, Sensor Tower

criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: Level and effectiveness of AI integration in the app's features.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analyses

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: Range and usefulness of productivity features offered by the app.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analyses

criteria.name: User Interface and Experience
criteria.description: Quality and intuitiveness of the app's user interface and overall user experience.
criteria.sources: User reviews, expert analyses, design awards

criteria.name: Cross-Platform Availability
criteria.description: Availability of the app across different platforms (e.g., iOS, Android, Web, Desktop).

criteria.name: Integration with Other Services
criteria.description: Ability to integrate with other apps and services to enhance productivity.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analyses

criteria.name: Innovation and Uniqueness
criteria.description: Innovative features and unique offerings that set the app apart from competitors.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analyses

criteria.name: Privacy and Security
criteria.description: Strength of privacy measures and security features to protect user data.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analyses, privacy policies

criteria.name: Accessibility
criteria.description: Accessibility features to make the app usable by people with disabilities.
criteria.sources: App descriptions, user reviews, expert analyses
